mapper.select:
select kl.question,kl.answer,kr.reference_count,kl.duration_ms,kl.error_message,kl.status from knowledge_query_log kl left join ( select count(*) as reference_count, query_log_id from knowledge_query_reference group by query_log_id )kr on kl.id = kr.query_log_id
and kl.status = #{status}
and kl.answer like CONCAT('%', #{answer}, '%')
order by kl.created_at desc

select id, sum(if(status='SUCCESS',1,0))as successCount, sum(if(status='NO_RESULT',1,0))as noResultCount, sum(if(status='FAILED',1,0))as failedCount, avg(duration_ms) as avgDurationMs from knowledge_query_log where 1=1
